subject: Two armored humanoid figures being engulfed and entangled in crystalline white energy tendrils, struggling in an alien trap
description: Two humanoid figures wearing light explorer-style armor are shown in a top-down or near-overhead perspective, being pulled into or engulfed by a mass of crystalline, icy-white tendrils or energy substance. One figure appears to be grabbed from behind, the other reaches outward with an outstretched hand in a desperate gesture. The entire scene is dominated by whites, creams, and pale tones — the crystalline substance fills most of the frame, creating the impression of an inescapable trap. The perspective and the alien nature of the entangling mass give the image a disorienting, helpless quality.
foreground: Two armored humans being engulfed in crystalline white energy mass
background: Crystalline white energy tendrils filling the frame
